homepage.description: Packaging automation made simple. Discover industry-leading machinery, expert support, and turnkey solutions from Viking Masek.

Find the Right Machine for Your Needs
Vertical Form Fill Seal (VFFS)
Vertical Form Fill Seal (VFFS)
Our industry-leading VFFS machines provide simplicity and efficiency for food and non-food applications. Quick, tool-free changeover — switch bag sizes in minutes!
Learn More
Stick Pack
Stick Pack
Meet all levels of demand for convenient, single-serve, on-the-go stick packaging with machines able to package up to 1,600 stick packs per minute!
Learn More
Flow Wrappers
Flow Wrappers
Versatile, robust, and efficient, our flow wrappers are designed to meet diverse packaging needs and requirements
Learn More
Premade Pouch Fillers
Premade Pouch Fillers
Streamline your operations and increase output by as much as 50% with our automated rotary premade pouch machines
Learn More
Cartoning & End of Line Automation
Cartoning & End of Line Automation
Servo-driven  endload, topload, and wraparound cartoning machines that are compact, user-friendly, and increase operator safety from primary packaging to palletizing
Learn More
Palletizing
Palletizing
Keep workers safe with automation solutions that efficiently unload bulk product and precisely stack cases of finished product on pallets
Learn More
Turnkey Packaging Systems
Turnkey Packaging Systems
Simplify! Our team will source, integrate, configure, test, and coordinate installation and service for your entire packaging system
Learn More
Not sure where to start? Let our auto-selection wizard help narrow your machine options.
Find the Right Machine
Engineered for Your Industry

Customer Success Stories:
Real Results,
Real Talk
We were struggling to run 45 bags per minute, and we routinely fell short of our productivity goals. Adding the M250 VFFS packaging system allowed us to increase to 72 bags per minute, and average 280–285 cases per hour, with an all-time high of 320. We now consistently achieve our goals, supported by strong metrics.
Read the Full Case Study
Initial Output
Bags / Minu

about.text:
Simple in Motion – Who We Are | Viking Masek
Skip to main content
Who We Are
Founded in the early 2000s as Leonhard Packaging Solutions (LPS), Viking Masek has evolved into a global leader in packaging machinery, built on a legacy of authenticity and driven by a steadfast commitment to customer-first partnerships.
Our journey is marked by significant milestones created and supported by a team whose entrepreneurial spirit and collaborative approach have been pivotal in delivering reliable, cutting-edge packaging solutions. Our team’s dedication moves us forward, and the needs of our employees and customers keep us focused on what matters most.
Looking Back,
Moving Forward
Rick and Robb Leonhard found Leonhard Packaging Solutions (LPS).
RC Huhn joins company leadership as CFO at Leonhard Packaging Solutions in Kohler, WI.
Scott Miller joins company leadership as Operations Manager.
Company name is changed to Viking Packaging Technologies, Inc.
Viking partners with Masek of Vlasim, Czech Republic.
Expansion of Kohler, WI, facilities to add engineering and accounting offices as well as a demo center.
Viking and Masek blend their brands to create a worldwide presence as Viking Masek Global Packaging Technologies.
Groundbreaking for new building construction in Oostburg, WI.
Move to new 35,000 sq. ft. facility in Oostburg, WI, to accommodate growing business.
Unprecedented growth spurs first phase of expansion of Oostburg, WI, facility. 18,000 sq. ft. of office and production space are added.
Premiere of
Innovations on Discovery Channel
Second phase of expansion of Oostburg, WI, facility adds sales & marketing wing and customer lounge.
Viking Masek chosen as form fill & seal equipment partner for innovative
STANDCAP pouch
launch.
Viking Masek named Sheboygan County Manufacturer of the Year.
Viking Masek installs
rooftop solar array
at its United States headquarters.
Viking Masek begins 33,000 sq ft
expansion project
at its United States headquarters, doubling their production capacity.
Robb Leonhard
appointed President
, succeeding brother Rick who passed away.
Viking Masek awarded a
Top Workplaces honor
by Milwaukee Journal Sentinel for three consecutive years.
Our team grew by over 30%, expanding the technical and service skills on our roster. And through a year of big changes, our mission stayed the same: Make packaging automation simple for our customers.  To close the year, Matt Miller was appointed Chief Executive Officer, supported by Bryan Lacy, President & CRO, and Nicole Piontek, CFO.
Step Inside Viking Masek
Get a feel for how we work, where we work, and what sets us apart.
Take a virtual tour of our modern Oostburg facility.
Simple in Motion:
Our Partnership Process
The Viking Masek approach to partnerships is defined by our dedication to making packaging simple. Motivated by our story to build your story, we listen with curiosity and empathy to build strong relationships, confidently transforming the goals of our customers into realities.
STEP ONE
DISCOVERY & CONSULTATION
We ask the right questions, listen intently, and get to know your business to understand your production challenges and goals.
STEP TWO
SOLUTION DEVELOPMENT
We continue the collaboration to customize a packaging automation solution that uniquely addresses your specific needs.
STEP THREE
IMPLEMENTATION & TRAINING
Once your turnkey system is ready, we provide worry-free installation and hands-on training to your team for seamless implementation.
STEP FOUR
ONGOING SUPPORT & OPTIMIZATION
Installation isn’t an end point, it’s an expansion of our trusted partnership to support you in all facets of packaging automation and new growth initiatives.
“Our Viking M250 bagger has performed flawlessly since installation back in 2007. In fact, it’s out-performing the specs Viking provided!”
Harris Carver
Atlanta Coffee & Tea
“I chose Viking because I heard they had good field service, and I was new to stick packing. The support is excellent.”
Bob Shapiro
Georgia Spic
